title: cyrtophlebium angustifolium
intro: Cyrtophlebium angustifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyrtophlebium angustifolium include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
